'''Science Station Youst''' was a [[XQ1 Platform]] used by the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]] as a research and was also a secret weapons facility.

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], towards the very end of the forty-year [[Sepan Civil War]], the station came under attack by [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] forces in the [[Battle of Science Station Youst]] as reprisal for an attack on their convoy by [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] raiders. The stations defenses which included a pair of [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle|Escort Shuttles]] and some [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] were not enough to repel the attack and hailed for assistance. [[Admiral]] [[Harkov]] with his starship [[Protector (Victory I-class)|Protector]] intervened and [[Sepan campaign|drove]] off the Ripoblus attack, despite the Ripobulus protesting about Youst's secret purpose. [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] then inspected the [[Xizor cargo container|containers]] to find out that Science Station Youst was storing illegal weaponry for research, proving the Ripoblus claims and confirming the [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Secret Order's]] suspicions and as a result the station was captured by Harkov, despite the Dimoks' attempts to stop them.
